summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of ADLTrack Caregiver and Family dashboards matching mobile app design. All features working correctly including vitals grid with correct colored icons (BP pink, Heart orange, Temp blue, Pain purple), navigation, sub-screens, and modals.
passed_tests: Family Dashboard Home tab: vitals grid with BP (pink #ec4899), Heart (orange #f59e0b), Temp (blue #3b82f6), Pain (purple #a855f7)
Family Dashboard Home tab: Today's Progress bar showing 0/12 tasks
Family Dashboard Home tab: My Requests / Care Timeline tabs both functional
Family Dashboard Menu tab: Mary Smith profile card present
Family Dashboard Menu tab: David Smith patient card clickable, opens Patient Profile modal
Family Dashboard Menu tab: Care Plan navigable - shows Primary Goals, Medications, Daily Schedule, Dietary Restrictions, Emergency Protocol
Family Dashboard Menu tab: Weekly Report navigable - shows 87% Compliance circle, stats grid, caregiver notes, performance trend
Family Dashboard Menu tab: Current Caregiver navigable - shows Julia Martinez photo, stats (4.9 rating, 5 years, 234 shifts), certifications, contact info
Family Dashboard Menu tab: Billing, Settings, Support buttons all present with colored icons
Family Dashboard Menu tab: Sign Out button functional
Family Dashboard Messages tab: conversation list with Family Group, Julia Martinez, Tom Smith
Family Dashboard Messages tab: clicking conversation opens chat view with messages
Family Dashboard Messages tab: chat input and send button functional
Family Dashboard Alerts tab: Upcoming Schedule showing Physical Therapy, Doctor Visit, Medication Refill
Family Dashboard Alerts tab: Recent Alerts with highlighted item (Medication Schedule Change)
Bottom navigation works correctly for Family dashboard (Home, Incident, Message, Alerts, Menu)
Patient Profile modal opens from Family Dashboard showing David Smith details
Caregiver Dashboard Menu tab: Julia Martinez profile card present
Caregiver Dashboard Menu tab: Medications, Earnings, Shift History, Settings, Support buttons with colored icons
Caregiver Dashboard Menu tab: Sign Out button functional
Caregiver Dashboard Shift tab: Current Shift card showing Active status, start time, patient, tasks completed
Caregiver Dashboard Shift tab: Active Client card showing David Smith
Caregiver Dashboard Shift tab: Quick Actions - View Earnings and Shift History
Caregiver Dashboard Shift tab: Shift History view showing Dec 15-11 entries with Completed/Cancelled status and filter tabs
Caregiver Dashboard Medications sub-screen: Summary stats (3 Total Meds, Given Today, Remaining)
Caregiver Dashboard Medications sub-screen: medication cards for Metformin, Lisinopril, Aspirin with Mark as Administered buttons
Bottom navigation works correctly for Caregiver dashboard (Home, Incident, Message, Shifts, Menu)
Patient Profile modal opens from Caregiver Dashboard showing David Smith details
seed_data_creation: None - app uses mock data from mockData.js

mocked_apis_list: All patient data, vitals, tasks, conversations, shifts, alerts, care plan data are mock data in /app/frontend/src/services/mockData.js
FAMILY_CONVERSATIONS (Family Group, Julia Martinez, Tom Smith)
CONVERSATIONS (Mary Smith POA, Sarah Johnson Supervisor, Michael Chen, Care Team Handoff)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Both Family and Caregiver dashboards fully tested at mobile viewport (430x932). Dark theme with bg-black and bg-[#1c1c1e] cards confirmed. Vitals icons colors verified: BP=pink (#ec4899), Heart=orange (#f59e0b), Temp=blue (#3b82f6), Pain=purple (#a855f7). All sub-screens (Care Plan, Weekly Report, Current Caregiver, Medications, Shift History) tested and working. Chat functionality works with input and send. Patient Profile modal opens from both dashboards. Bottom navigation uses data-testid='nav-{tab}' format. Use JavaScript clicks for navigation to bypass Emergent badge overlay. Sign Out flow returns to landing page.
